mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE
AND (TITLE LIKE '%'||#{search}||'%' OR CONTENT LIKE '%'||#{search}||'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE PINNED_YN = #{pinnedYn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE STATUS = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE POPUP_YN = 'Y'

SELECT NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PINNED_YN AS pinnedYn, POPUP_YN AS popupYn, POPUP_START_AT AS popupStartAt, POPUP_END_AT AS popupEndAt, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, END_DATE AS endDate FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, PINNED_YN = #{pinnedYn}, POPUP_YN = #{popupYn}, POPUP_START_AT = #{popupStartAt, jdbcType=DATE}, POPUP_END_AT = #{popupEndAt, jdbcType=DATE}, STATUS = #{status}, END_DATE = #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET POPUP_YN = 'N' WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}

UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET STATUS = CASE WHEN END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND END_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 0 ELSE STATUS END, POPUP_YN = CASE WHEN END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND END_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'N' WHEN POPUP_END_AT IS NOT NULL AND POPUP_END_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'N' ELSE POPUP_YN END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE (STATUS = 1 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND END_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE)) OR (POPUP_YN = 'Y' AND POPUP_END_AT IS NOT NULL AND POPUP_END_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE))
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE STATUS = 1
AND (TITLE LIKE '%'||#{search}||'%' OR CONTENT LIKE '%'||#{search}||'%')
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, POPUP_START_AT AS popupStartAt, POPUP_END_AT AS popupEndAt FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE POPUP_YN = 'Y' AND STATUS = 1 AND (POPUP_START_AT IS NULL OR POPUP_START_AT <= SYSDATE) AND (POPUP_END_AT IS NULL OR POPUP_END_AT >= SYSDATE) AND ROWNUM = 1
